Adding annotation from SIRIUS to the mmo object

AddSiriusAnnot.Rd

This function reads SIRIUS structure identification and formula summary files, and adds the annotations to the mmo object.

Usage

AddSiriusAnnot(
  mmo,
  canopus_structuredir,
  canopus_formuladir,
  filter_annot = FALSE,
  filter_threshold = 0.5
)

Arguments

mmo

The mmo object

canopus_structuredir

Path to the SIRIUS structure_identification.tsv file

canopus_formuladir

Path to the SIRIUS canopus_formula_summary.tsv file

filter_annot

Logical. If TRUE, filter the annotations by probability threshold in CANOPUS.

filter_threshold

Numeric between 0 and 1. The probability threshold for filtering annotations.

Value

The mmo object with SIRIUS annotations added

Examples

if (FALSE) {
mmo <- AddSiriusAnnot(mmo,
 canopus_structuredir = "path/to/structure_identification.tsv",
 canopus_formuladir = "path/to/canopus_formula_summary.tsv"
)
}
